zh.lifeSummary: 當Finetta Fraser於1136年出生在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾時，她的父親John Fraser of Peebles19歲，母親Maria Fraser16歲。她和Sir Archibald Gillespic Campbell - Fifth Lord of Lochawe, Knight至少有7個兒子。她去世在她的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾可雷南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Finetta Fraser于1136年出生在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾时，她的父亲John Fraser of Peebles19岁，母亲Maria Fraser16岁。她和Sir Archibald Gillespic Campbell - Fifth Lord of Lochawe, Knight至少有7个儿子。她去世在她的家乡，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾可雷南。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

en.lifeSummary: When Finetta Fraser was born in 1136, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Fraser of Peebles, was 19 and her mother, Maria Fraser, was 16. She had at least 7 sons with Sir Archibald Gillespic Campbell - Fifth Lord of Lochawe, Knight. She died in her hometown, and was buried in Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Finetta Fraser est née en 1136, à Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Fraser of Peebles, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Maria Fraser, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils avec Sir Archibald Gillespic Campbell - Fifth Lord of Lochawe, Knight. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Kilchrenan, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Finetta Fraser 1136 in Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Fraser of Peebles 19 und ihre Mutter Maria Fraser 16. Sie hatte mit Sir Archibald Gillespic Campbell - Fifth Lord of Lochawe, Knight mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Finetta Fraser è nata il nel 1136 nel Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Fraser of Peebles, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Maria Fraser, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli con Sir Archibald Gillespic Campbell - Fifth Lord of Lochawe, Knight. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Finetta Fraserが1136年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Fraser of Peeblesは19歳，母Maria Fraserは16歳であった。彼女はSir Archibald Gillespic Campbell - Fifth Lord of Lochawe, Knightとの間に少なくとも7人の息子をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルキルチレナンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Finetta Fraser(이)가 1136년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Fraser of Peebles(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria Fraser(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Sir Archibald Gillespic Campbell - Fifth Lord of Lochawe, Knight(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 킬크리난에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Finetta Fraser nasceu em 1136, em Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Fraser of Peebles, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Maria Fraser, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos com Sir Archibald Gillespic Campbell - Fifth Lord of Lochawe, Knight. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Finetta Fraser родилась в 1136 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Fraser of Peebles было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Fraser, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей от Sir Archibald Gillespic Campbell - Fifth Lord of Lochawe, Knight. Она умерла в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности килчренан, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Finetta Fraser nació en 1136, en Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Fraser of Peebles, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Maria Fraser, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos con Sir Archibald Gillespic Campbell - Fifth Lord of Lochawe, Knight. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.
